title: Wobble | wooden box
content: Defect: Wobble | wooden boxCause: 1)humidity fluctuation; 2)poor workmanship during assemblingSolution: 1)control wooden board humidity among 7~12%; 2)need a absolute flat platform during assembling; 3)inspection before packaging, and store in dry & well-protected warehouse.Typical: * * * *Rework difficulty: * * *Rework collateral risk: * * *

title: Dirty mark on Nitrile glove
content: Defect: Dirty mark on Nitrile gloveCause: Oil pollution on moldSolution: clean mold and machines before injection, and clean products out from beginning until no dirty mark found from injection.Typical: * * *Rework difficulty: * *Rework collateral risk: *
